mapper.select:
select
from sys_user where ryid = #{ryid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and delete_flg = 0
select ryid , real_name userName, `password` from sys_user where concat(real_name,replace(birthday,'-','')) = #{loginId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and delete_flg=0
select ryid, real_name userName, `password` from sys_user where real_name = #{realName} and `password` = #{password} and delete_flg = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (ryid, real_name, birthday, `password`, delete_flg) VALUES (#{ryid}, #{real_name}, '2000-01-01', #{password}, 0)
